prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-12INCAMPINGHAMMER-BLK Product Type: ANCHOR_STAKE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 13oz Carbon Steel Camping Hammer with Tent Stake Puller Hand Tool, 12 Inch Description: Don’t spend back breaking hours attempting to install and remove tent stakes or ground anchors with regular tools, or your hands for that matter. Instead, use this unique camping hammer with tent stakes puller or hook from ASR Outdoor to save on set up time and removal efficiency.

This hammer boasts two important materials to note: carbon steel and aluminum. Carbon steel you’ll find make up the flat face hammer head and bottom hook or tent stakes puller. This material is ideal for its strength, durability and rust resistance that you can rely on. The aluminum you’ll find makes up the hammer handle, counterbalancing the weight of the head and hook, allowing for easy and lightweight handling when in use.

In addition to the camping hammers formidable material construction, it has a built in carbon steel wide digging claw on the top backside, to help with ground anchors installation or other tasks and jobs that arise around the campsite or elsewhere. The camping hammer with tent stakes puller also includes an added safety strap. In an easy to spot red colorway, the strap attachment not only adds extra security, but exterior gear or on person packing and carrying options. You’ll also find a hole in the top of the camping hammer head to not only reduce and balance weight, but to provide hanging options at home when not in use.

Don’t let this lightweight camping hammer fool you, it’s design and material construction are both purposeful and intentional, won’t weigh you or your camping gear down, and will no doubt help to save on tent installation set up and take down time.

Dimensions: 12 x 4.25 x 1.5 inches

Weight: 13oz or 0.81lbs Search Terms: Camping essentials accessories gifts hammer hand tools outdoor backpacking camping gear sporting goods tent stakes puller tent pegs ground anchors screw in tent stakes survival gear and supplies bug out bag mountaineering hiking gifts for men Features: - CAMPING ESSENTIALS: Pack this carbon steel hammer and tent stakes puller with aluminum handle to make installing and removing tent stakes or ground anchors fast and efficient; easily reduce time and physical strain setting up camping tents, tie downs or other with this unique camping hammer - CARBON STEEL TENT STAKES PULLER: Forged high carbon steel head and hook or tent stakes puller make this camping hammer a tough, durable and rust resistant tool; the hammer also features a wide digging claw to help with ground anchors installation or other tasks around the campsite - ALUMINUM HAMMER HANDLE: Lightweight design makes handling the hammer and tent stakes puller easy and efficient but doesn’t compromise on strength, durability and resistance to general outdoor gear wear and tear - SAFETY STRAP: Carbon steel hammer and tent stakes puller comes with easy to spot red colored safety strap attachment for added security and exterior gear or on person packing and carrying options - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 12 x 4.25 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 13oz or 0.81lbs; Color: Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12 Inch Black Camping Hammer Tent Stake Puller

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12 in Black Camping Hammer Tent Stake Puller

anthropic.title_differentiation: Carbon Steel Head And Hook, Aluminum Handle, Digging Claw, Safety Strap, 13Oz, Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: Carbon Steel Head And Puller Lightweight Aluminum Handle Safety Strap Wide Digging Claw Rust Resistant
